intent_head: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read /AGENTS.MD, context), inspected /99_system per rulebook, and used canonical cast records for birthday authority.
